meta.name: LILLY Component Specifications
meta.description: Machine-readable specifications for all UI components in LILLY. Each component includes its props, variants, states, and composition rules. Intended for use with Skeleton UI + Svelte 5.
meta.path_convention: All file paths are relative to the frontend/ package root (e.g. src/lib/ means frontend/src/lib/ in the monorepo).
meta.i18n_note: All user-facing strings in this file (labels, sublabels, empty_message texts) are de-locale examples. In implementation, use Paraglide.js i18n keys instead of hardcoding these strings.

AppShell.description: Root layout component. Provides sidebar on desktop (>=1024px) and bottom navigation on mobile (<1024px). Uses Skeleton UI AppShell.

behavior.sidebar_collapse: Toggle between full (280px) and icon-only (72px) mode via button. State persisted in localStorage.
behavior.responsive: Below lg breakpoint (1024px), sidebar is hidden and BottomNav appears.

Sidebar.description: Desktop navigation sidebar with glassmorphism effect. Shows nav items with icons and labels. Collapsible to icon-only mode.

collapsed.description: Whether sidebar is in icon-only mode.

features: Active route highlighting with brand primary glow
Unread message badge on Nachrichten item

BottomNav.description: Mobile bottom navigation bar. Shows 5 primary destinations with icons. Visible only below lg breakpoint.

behavior.active_indicator: Pill-shaped highlight behind active icon with brand primary color and subtle glow.
behavior.badge: Numeric badge on Nachrichten for unread count.

TopBar.description: Sticky top bar with glassmorphism. Shows LILLY logo/wordmark, search trigger, theme toggle, and notification bell.

CommandPalette.description: Global search overlay (Cmd+K / Ctrl+K). Searches across series, issues, and users. Glassmorphism modal with elevated card style.
CommandPalette.trigger: Keyboard shortcut Cmd+K / Ctrl+K, or search icon in TopBar

sections.label: Hefte
sections.description: Search issues by title, number, or author

behavior.keyboard_navigation: Arrow keys to navigate, Enter to select, Escape to close
behavior.recent_searches: Show last 5 searches when input is empty

CoverCard.description: Primary visual element: displays a single Heftroman cover with status overlay. Used in grids, search results, and trade views.

issue.description: Issue data including cover_url, title, issue_number

collection_entry.description: If present, shows ownership status and condition

visual.hover_effect: Scale 1.05 with glow shadow, 200ms spring easing
visual.loading: Skeleton placeholder with shimmer animation matching card dimensions

condition_badge.style: Small pill badge, colored per condition.Z* token, backdrop-blur

variants.missing: No indicator, cover shown at 40% opacity with dashed border

issue_number.style: Glass pill with mono font, always visible

CoverGrid.description: Responsive grid of CoverCards. Primary view for browsing a series or collection. Uses CSS Grid with auto-fill.

min_column_width.description: Minimum column width for CSS Grid auto-fill

CoverGrid.css: display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(var(--min-col), 1fr)); gap: 1rem;
features: Virtualized scrolling for 500+ items (svelte-virtual-list or similar)
Skeleton loading state shows 12 placeholder cards with shimmer
Intersection Observer for lazy loading cover images

SeriesProgressBar.description: Visual progress indicator for collection completeness of a series. Shows owned/total with animated bar.

visual.bar_animation: Width transition 500ms with spring easing on mount
visual.label: '{owned} von {total} — {percentage}%' in body_small style
visual.duplicate_indicator: Small purple segment at end of bar if duplicates > 0

IssueDetailSheet.description: Bottom sheet (mobile) or side panel (desktop) showing full details of a single issue. Glassmorphism elevated card.

layout.mobile: Bottom sheet, slides up from bottom, max 85vh, draggable handle
layout.desktop: Side panel, slides in from right, 420px width

sections.name: header
content: Large cover image (swipeable if user has photos)

sections.name: community
sections.description: Visible to all, writable for authenticated users

sections.name: trade_info
content: Number of collectors who have this issue as duplicate
Number of collectors seeking this issue
sections.description: Shows trade availability at a glance

ConditionChips.description: Horizontal chip group for selecting Heftroman condition grade Z0–Z5. Single-select.

visual.selected: Filled with respective condition color, white text, subtle glow

TradeMatchCard.description: Card showing a potential trade match between current user and another collector. Shows what each side offers/seeks.

match.description: Contains partner info, offered items, requested items, match score

layout.top: Partner avatar + display name + location (if public)
layout.middle: Two columns: 'Du bietest' (your duplicates they want) | 'Du erhältst' (their duplicates you want). Each shows mini CoverCards.
layout.bottom: Match score indicator + 'Tausch vorschlagen' CTA button

visual.match_score: Circular progress ring showing match quality percentage
visual.divider: Vertical glassmorphism divider between offer columns with ArrowLeftRight icon

MessageThread.description: Chat-like message thread between two users, optionally linked to a trade. Bubble layout.

layout.header: Partner avatar + name + trade reference link (if linked)
layout.messages: Scrollable list, own messages right-aligned (brand primary), partner messages left-aligned (glass card)
layout.input: Fixed bottom: text input + send button. Glassmorphism background.

CollectionFilterBar.description: Horizontal filter/sort bar above CoverGrid. Sticky below TopBar on scroll.

StatsCard.description: Dashboard statistic card showing a single KPI with label, value, and optional trend. Used on Dashboard and Profile pages.

visual.icon: Top-right corner, brand primary color at 20% opacity, 48px

PhotoUploader.description: Photo upload component for documenting Heftroman condition. Supports camera capture (mobile) and file selection.
features: Camera capture button (uses navigator.mediaDevices on mobile)
Photo preview grid with reorder drag handles
Client-side image compression before upload (max 2048px, 85% JPEG quality)

ThemeToggle.description: Animated toggle button for switching between light, dark, and system theme. Shows sun/moon/monitor icon.
ThemeToggle.behavior: Cycles through: system → light → dark → system. Respects prefers-color-scheme when set to system. Persists choice in localStorage.
ThemeToggle.animation: Icon rotates and scales during transition (200ms spring easing)

EmptyState.description: Friendly empty state illustration with CTA. Used when lists/grids have no data.
